name: AwsJobExponentialRolloutRate
description: The rate of increase for a job rollout. This parameter allows you to define an exponential rate increase for a job rollout.

allOf.description: The minimum number of things that will be notified of a pending job, per minute, at the start of the job rollout. This is the initial rate of the rollout.
The rate of increase for a job rollout. The number of things notified is multiplied by this factor.

The criteria to initiate the increase in rate of rollout for a job.

Amazon Web Services IoT Core supports up to one digit after the decimal (for example, 1.5, but not 1.55).
